forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the Barossa Valley. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then increasing to 40 km/h before turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, high chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers east of Stuart Highway, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. High chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the late morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog north of Oodnadatta. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
